Caption: Experimental injection setup within the aluminium box, along with the scheme of the PID sensor (A) and the custom made dish (B).

Dispersion model performance by comparing the Geometric Mean Bias and the Geometric Variance. Approaches: D = Dollet; KZ = Kelly-Zion.
